depends_on: handoff or artifact id that produced the finding
objective: Repair <problem-type> for <scene-id or artifact path> while preserving current source ownership and returning the expected output contract.

inputs.notes: Finding source, severity, owner mapping, and recommended action from artifact-problem-routing.md.
Include finding ids, timestamps, sampled frames, screenshots, or artifact fields that prove the issue.
Include scene_id, scene_index, timing, and scenario_scene_fingerprint for scene-linked repairs.
Include scene_pack_id, prop requirements, route, candidate requirements, and scene pack fingerprint when relevant.

definition_of_done: The owner artifact is repaired or explicitly blocked with structured evidence.
Current scene lineage fields are preserved when the repair is scene-linked.
Validation evidence is written or referenced, and downstream invalidation is reported.
stop_conditions: Paid API spend, generation credits, licensed media, paid template use, external critique, or release waiver is required without approval.
Required source artifacts are missing or stale and cannot be repaired inside the owner scope.
The fix belongs to another production agent.
The same blocker persists after one targeted repair attempt.
revision_policy: Repair only the affected owner-scoped artifacts. Return handoff recommendations for other owners instead of editing their artifacts.
budget_policy: No paid API calls, generation credits, licensed downloads, external uploads, paid critique, or paid templates without explicit Director/user approval.
